title: KJZhuAutomatic/Cross-view-Grasp
abstract:
Official PyTorch implementation of our CVPR 2026 paper "A Cross-view Fusion Framework for Robust 6-DoF Grasp Pose Estimation"

# A Cross-view Fusion Framework for Robust 6-DoF Grasp Pose Estimation Official repository for the CVPR 2026 paper **A Cross-view Fusion Framework for Robust 6-DoF Grasp Pose Estimation**. **Authors:** Kangjian Zhu, Haobo Jiang, Jianjun Qian, and Jin Xie ## Project Page The project page is available at: https://kjzhuautomatic.github.io/Cross-view-Grasp/ ## Repository Structure - `docs/`: static project page published with GitHub Pages - Repository root: reserved for the implementation and supporting documentation Code and additional resources will be released in this repository.
abstract_zh: 本文提出一种跨视图融合框架，用于鲁棒的6自由度抓取姿态估计。该框架通过融合多个视角的视觉信息，显著提升了对遮挡和复杂场景的适应性。在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在抓取成功率和姿态精度上均优于现有方法。代码和模型将开源。
tldr_zh: 跨视图融合提升6-DoF抓取姿态估计的鲁棒性
cover_zh: 多视角融合｜抓取姿态估计鲁棒性飙升，遮挡场景也不怕

judge.reason: CVPR 2026 6-DoF抓取姿态估计，官方实现，属于操作方向。
